channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Daylight Saving Time Enhances the Year
item.description: The biannual clock adjustment allows us to enjoy the daylight a little longer.

item.title: The Major Rollback of DEI Initiatives
item.description: The Trump administration is quietly but effectively dismantling a system that had tilted the playing field toward the left for generations.

item.title: Red State Freedom Outperforms European Green Socialism for the Environment
item.description: A lighter approach to climate policy repeatedly produces better outcomes for people and the planet.

item.title: Pro-Palestine Groups File Lawsuit Based on Unfounded Grievances
item.description: The lawsuit essentially writes its own motion to dismiss.
